== Notes for [[Item:Q107167|Q107167]] ==

* From Hudood-e-Kiraam of ???
* Wllaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

ID: I180891

Name: Isma'il ibn Muhammad al-Husayn 1

Sex: M

Name: Isma'il ibn Muhammad 1

Birth: ABT 789 1

Father: Muhammad ibn Isma'il al-Husayn b: ABT 759

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Ahmed ibn Isma'il al-Husayn b: 818

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2
--------------------

Source: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history413.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000009387649996

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
